terms.definition: Who. A question word used to ask about a person or being. In this poem, 'Kaun' is used repeatedly to ask who is behind the wonders of nature.
terms.exampleUsage: फूलों में रंग कौन भरता है? (Who fills colours in flowers?)

terms.definition: Mystery or secret. Something that is hidden and not easily understood. Nature is full of mysteries that make us wonder and ask questions.
terms.exampleUsage: प्रकृति के रहस्य बहुत गहरे हैं। (The mysteries of nature are very deep.)

terms.definition: Curiosity. The strong desire to know or learn something new. This poem awakens jigyaasa by asking many questions about nature's wonders.
terms.exampleUsage: बच्चों में जिज्ञासा होना बहुत ज़रूरी है। (It is very important for children to have curiosity.)

terms.definition: Nature. The natural world around us including trees, flowers, rivers, mountains, sky, animals, and all living things. The poem celebrates the beauty and mystery of Prakriti.
terms.exampleUsage: प्रकृति बहुत सुंदर है। (Nature is very beautiful.)

terms.definition: Poem or poetry. A piece of writing that uses rhythm, rhyme, and imagery to express feelings and ideas in a beautiful way. This chapter is a kavita full of questions.
terms.exampleUsage: यह कविता बहुत सुंदर है। (This poem is very beautiful.)

terms.definition: Rhyming. When the ending sounds of two lines in a poem match, it is called tukbandi. Rhyming makes poems musical and easier to remember.
terms.exampleUsage: इस कविता में अच्छी तुकबंदी है। (This poem has good rhyming.)

terms.definition: Wonder or amazement. The feeling of being surprised and amazed by something extraordinary. The poem fills us with aashcharya about nature.
terms.exampleUsage: प्रकृति को देखकर आश्चर्य होता है। (Looking at nature fills one with wonder.)

terms.definition: Shine or sparkle. The bright light or glow that comes from something. In the poem, the poet asks who gives chamak to the stars.
terms.exampleUsage: तारों की चमक रात को सुंदर बनाती है। (The sparkle of stars makes the night beautiful.)

terms.definition: Poet. A person who writes poems (kavitaayein). A kavi uses beautiful words, rhythm, and imagery to express feelings and ideas about the world.
terms.exampleUsage: इस कविता के कवि ने सुंदर सवाल पूछे हैं। (The poet of this poem has asked beautiful questions.)

terms.definition: Line (of a poem or text). Each line in a poem is called a pankti. Poems are made of panktiyaan (lines) that together create meaning, rhythm, and beauty.
terms.exampleUsage: इस कविता की हर पंक्ति में एक सवाल है। (Every line of this poem has a question.)
